titleStmt.title: SII 24.280: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 280. (A.R. No. 419 of 1961-62.) PROPER LEFT OF ENTRANCE INTO THE VEḶḶAI-GŌPURAM.

summary.p: In fragments. Seems to record sale of lands by (1) Araiyaṉ Kuṟukkaipāḍi, son of Vaḷavataraiyaṉ, the headman of Kūriyūr in [Pal]kuṉṟa-kōṭṭam and (2) Araiyaṉ Kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ, Nandiyarāyaṉ and others to Viṭṭaiya-daṇḍanāyaka who apparently granted the same to provide for worship. Other details are lost.
The inscription is engraved in characters of about the 13th century.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pattu Iraṇṭāvatu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pā
kuṉṟakoṭṭattu kūriyūr kiḻavaṉ vaḷavataraiyaṉ maka
viṭṭaya[te ?]ṇṭanāyakattiṟkku nāṉ Iṟṟaināḷāl vi
mpaṅkuṭiil kuṟukkaipāṭiyuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ
ṇiyāka peṟṟu Uṭaiyeṉṉāy nāṉ Anupavittu varuci
mam Āka mikuti kuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka pottakappaṭi rūpāy (1/2) In
māṉṉeṉ yin nilam Araiyum viṟṟuk kuṭuttukkoṇṭa

�vum Ip vampukku nāṅkā
ṇa Icaivuttiṭṭu kuṭuttom I
m tāyilu nallāṉum viśveśvara
tu muppatiṉāyirattu Aṟunūṟṟu Iru
koṇṭa perumāṉāṉa kaḷappāḷa
kaipāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Oṟ
ḷukku mutukaṇpaṭṭamaikkum Ivai

tiruva ku
tu Oṭṭuppaṭi veli Oṉṟukku nu
ṉārkku tiruvārātaṉaśeṣamāka jiya
nikki nellu Irupatiṉ kalamum 4
Innilattāl varum tiṟappu kaṭa
ḷ nilattukkum puṉceykkum

Ivvayal pali viṭṭayateṇṭanāyakkar
koḷḷak kaṭavarākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu nilavilai
Araiyaṉ kaḷappāḷarāyaṉum nantiyarāyaṉūm ciṟṟāṇ
ṭāḷum Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭi cammatittu Ikkā
yum viṟṟukkuṭuttamaikku Ivai kuṟukkaipāṭi U�
ku mutukaṇpaṭṭu Iṉṉilam viṟṟukkuṭuttamaikku
Iṉṉilam viṟṟukkuṭuttamaikku

ṭaiyāṉ
ṅkarāyaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ I
ceṟṟuṭaiyāṉ Ātimūlame ṭṭa
ṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Etimalai U
rāyaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ veḻapa
ṉ tiruniyamakiḻāṉ Irācamāṇikkappa
muṭaiyāṉ Ātittatevaṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 24.280 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
